prompt:
Goal: Create a premium, highly believable deluxe board game box front for an imaginary tabletop strategy game titled KINGDOMS BELOW THE SEA, designed to look like a real shelf-worthy hobby-store product.

Canvas: Square board game box front shown straight-on with a slight visible top edge and side depth, realistic product photography lighting, dark blurred tabletop/background. The box is deep navy and teal with ornate antique-gold foil borders, corner filigree, and embossed metallic typography.

Main artwork: Epic underwater fantasy kingdom scene in cinematic painterly realism. In the foreground, place two regal sea monarch figures facing inward: on the left, an imposing armored sea king with a spiked coral crown, long dark beard, flowing robes, ornate gold-and-bone armor, and a tall trident; on the right, a queen/priestess figure with a coral crown, elegant dark robes, shell-like armor, and a staff topped with a glowing blue orb. Around them are rocky reefs, coral formations, fish, jellyfish, and shadowy sea creatures. In the midground, show an underwater city of towers, domes, bridges, and illuminated streets with armies or fleets gathering along a central path. In the background, a gigantic whale swims above the city through shafts of blue light, with schools of fish silhouetted in the water. The mood is majestic, strategic, ancient, collectible, and slightly dark.

Title and text layout: At the top center, huge embossed gold serif title text: KINGDOMS BELOW THE SEA. Directly underneath, smaller gold serif subtitle: DELUXE EDITION inside an ornate gold cartouche. Below that, small uppercase tagline: CLAIM THE DEPTHS. RULE THE TIDE.

Bottom information strip: Along the bottom left, include exactly 4 gold icon/stat blocks: 1) meeple icon with “2–5 PLAYERS”, 2) clock icon with “90–180 MIN”, 3) person icon with “AGES 14+”, 4) cube/hex icon with “COMPLEXITY HEAVY”.

Faction row: Centered above the bottom caption, include exactly 5 shield faction crests with labels: 1) blue crest “AZURAI HIGH TIDE”, 2) green crest “NEREID SYNDICATE”, 3) red crest “CORALION EMPIRE”, 4) purple crest “ABYSSAL COVENANT”, 5) gray-gold crest “DROWNED LEGION”.

Bottom caption and publisher: Under the faction row, add small gold uppercase text: A STRATEGY GAME OF AREA CONTROL, ASYMMETRICAL POWERS & ANCIENT WARS. Bottom right, add a gold trident logo and publisher name: THALASSAR GAMES.

Visual style: Premium fantasy board game cover, ultra-detailed digital painting, realistic printed box texture, metallic gold foil effect, deep ocean blues and aquamarines, high contrast, dramatic volumetric underwater light rays, ornate luxury packaging, crisp readable typography, no extra text, no watermark.
